question.label: Heavier than sounded
question.name: When you say 'heavier' — what was making it heavy day to day?
question.description: Drills into the specific load Lin just named so the friction is concrete rather than implied.

answer: Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.

assessment.note: She names sustained load from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews, signaling strong over-centralization and strain on day-to-day ownership.

new_queue.label: Decision bottlenecks
new_queue.name: Decision bottlenecks — where are they stacking up most right now?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: What to drop
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to take on next?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would actually be useful from me over the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
